sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33114" key="e)ktu/lwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκτῠ´λ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n33114.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">removal of callosity</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
